title: Cooking Potato
description: Another Optimization ModPack with QoL included
body:
# **WARNING!** ## This Project is abandoned as i'm working on something new Cooking Potato is an optimization modpack even able to work as an Optifine substitute, most of the features on that are available but some of them still need to wait but probably you should be happy with the available ones, for what i tested the result was that maybe can do more than other packs, but not always and can depend from situation to situation when maybe others can do slightly more GTX 1650 Super
Intel Core i5-8500
16GB RAM [1.0 Test on SinglePlayer World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JHWqXUD7/images/6ae4c9043f8fabf130864c8a5eca5651dd752446.png)
[1.0 Test on Hypixel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JHWqXUD7/images/2e8ed68a893f7e36f39f0de0a944c1219f008d5d.png) Remember: This is not going always to work like to me as not all of the PCs are the same, so if for you this pack works bad, don't use it or maybe if you have time try to change some settings to make it feel more smooth, default settings try to mantain perfomance but at the same time a good appearence to the game I'm working on a way to make you report bugs, stay tuned!
